summary: Iteration 32: BIQC Final Beta Launch Clearance - ALL TESTS PASSED. 9/9 backend tests passed (health check returns 200, all auth-protected endpoints return 403). Frontend: Landing page loads with BIQC branding, Login page loads with Google/Microsoft OAuth, Admin Prompt Lab route exists (redirects to login when unauthenticated as expected).

All endpoints verified: /api/health=200, all auth-protected endpoints return 403 (calibration/status, executive-mirror, soundboard/conversations, business-profile, dashboard/stats, chat/history), admin prompts endpoints return 403 (super_admin gated). Frontend pages verified: / (landing with BIQC branding), /login-supabase (OAuth + email login), /admin/prompt-lab (protected route redirects to login).
